commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=9b48aeefbf3bd5d389d2f7e17173bbbf8daed343)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a QQBot error formatter used by token, gateway, and outbound paths, plus focused tests for missing credentials and missing access tokens.

PR surface: Source +30, Tests +116. Total +146 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main's QQBot token, gateway, and outbound paths emit terse missing-credential or access-token errors without the requested docs and env-var guidance. I did not run the tests because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof plus a small wording adjustment, not an automated repair lane while proof is missing.

target.title: fix(qqbot): add actionable auth error guidance
target.body:
Fixes #65868.

## Summary
- replaces terse QQBot missing-credential errors with setup guidance and docs/credential links
- adds actionable network guidance for QQBot token fetch failures
- preserves raw QQBot token response details while adding context for invalid credentials

## Test plan
- `git diff --check`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-messaging.config.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/api/token.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/gateway.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/outbound.test.ts` (3 files, 8 tests)

## Real behavior proof
**Behavior or issue addressed**: QQBot setup/auth failures previously surfaced terse messages such as missing credentials or raw token JSON without telling operators where to configure credentials or what QQ Open Platform condition to check.

**Real environment tested**: Local OpenClaw checkout on Linux at commit `c9fc048df675e81deea7f476f8e0e25566e7ed90` plus follow-up scoped cleanup commit.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch**: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-messaging.config.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/api/token.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/gateway.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/messaging/outbound.test.ts`

**Evidence after fix**: Terminal output from the patched checkout:
```text
Test Files  3 passed (3)
Tests  8 passed (8)
```

**Observed result after fix**: The QQBot token, gateway, and outbound paths now emit copied live error strings containing `QQBOT_APP_ID`, `QQBOT_CLIENT_SECRET`, `https://q.qq.com/`, `https://docs.openclaw.ai/channels/qqbot`, and token network/IP-whitelist guidance instead of only terse or raw errors.

**What was not tested**: A live QQ Open Platform credential exchange was not run because it requires real QQBot credentials.
target.author: alix-007

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
